title: フィリーズレビューにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Fillies' Revue is here. Today, we'll finally find
out if Curren Chan has a chance of winning the
Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At 1,400 meters, it's a little longer than the
distance she's best at, but she faces it with
enthusiasm and cuteness.
